holdings.infoBox: LATR is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are Visa Inc. stock at 14.24%, Mastercard at 12.33%, Sezzle at 6.08%, Affirm Holdings at 5.42%, and Klarna Group at 5.36%.

overview.description: The Corgi Buy Now Pay Later ETF (LATR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies involved in buy now, pay later and point-of-sale financing ecosystems, including payment platforms, underwriting tools, checkout software, and related consumer credit infrastructure. The fund seeks capital growth. LATR was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
